name: to.agentcentral/amazon-seller-central
title: agentcentral
description: Hosted Amazon Seller Central MCP server and Amazon Ads MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI clients, with an Amazon seller data layer for inventory, orders, catalog, finance, and fulfillment.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer agentcentral API key, for example: Bearer ac_live_<YOUR_API_KEY>
